_metadata.title: Power to request documentation and information

obligations.source_quote: The provider of the general-purpose AI model concerned, or its representative shall supply the information requested.
obligations.addressee_note: Provider of a general-purpose AI model (or its representative) when requested by the Commission

decomposed_atoms.description: Provider must supply information requested by the Commission during investigations
decomposed_atoms.requirement: The provider SHALL supply the information requested by the Commission

obligations.scope_limitation: Only applies to providers of general-purpose AI models when requested by the Commission
